'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 11''' was published in August [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The ''[[Star Wars]]'' Symphony", by [[Zak Jones]]: a profile of [[John Williams]] and the production of his score for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original ''Star Wars'' film]].
*"[[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]]!", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: a discussion on the possible physics behind hyperspace and interstellar flight.
*"The Men Behind the Masks", by [[John May]]: profiles of actors [[Anthony Daniels]], [[Kenny Baker]], [[Peter Mayhew]], and [[David Prowse]], and the behind-the-scenes work which turned them into [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].
